creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
Konq doesn't know what to display for files/dirs/links/whatever in the
directory window for a fish:// url. It also does not handle drag/drop of
dirs from fish:// urls correctly.

History on kde-freebsd list.

Fix: 

Not yet.
How-To-Repeat: 
Go to fish://user@localhost/ in konq.
